about: Suggest an improvement or a new skill

## Problem

<!-- What problem would this solve, and for whom? Concrete scenarios are more useful than abstract framings. -->

## Proposed change

<!-- What should happen? If this is a new skill, include:
     - a rough SKILL.md description
     - invocation patterns ("use when the user says X")
     - scope and non-goals -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Other approaches you thought about and why you think this one is better. -->

## Why this marketplace

<!-- If proposing a new skill or plugin, why does it belong here rather than as a standalone repo? -->

## Additional context

<!-- Links, screenshots, prior art, related issues. -->
